data.body: KICKOFF (rebar-implement). Epic jira-reb-1003 'Guard rebar plans against project-shaped portability assumptions' — 4 child tasks, dogfood of the .rebar/ project-criteria overlay. Delivery/stack order (dep-ordered): 3863 immune-floury-toad (activate project.portability finder: criteria_routing.json + prompt + criterion tests) -> {2ad8 truthful-specified-silverfish (plan_review_moves.json coaching move + tests), 21dd indigoid-unmystic-serpent (eval corpus + live calibration + tests; has [operator-attested] live-LLM eval AC)} -> f698 taurine-catchable-kakarikis (docs/plan-review-gate.md + docs test + full make lint/typecheck/test gate). Landing method: rebar/Gerrit default — each leaf a stacked change pushed to refs/for/main, closed after Verified+1, stack submitted at end. Worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-jira-reb-1003 branch jira-reb-1003-portability off origin/main 87304c5ea. Local venv + [agents]+[eval] extras verified; hooks (pre-commit + commit-msg) installed. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY present.
